posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 8 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 178 others Nazimov vs. GustavoIlkhom Nazimov, TKO, R1Gustavo is a fun brawler so this is a good matchup for Nazimov, but I do think he’s a little overrated for the last win. He is a stick striker with insane ko power but he dos seem kind of fragile. That being said, Gustavo is going to fight the type of fight he wants, and I think Nazimov will spark himOta vs. HokamuraShinobu Ota, TKO, R2Ota should take this fairly easily. His record is terrible but he’s also taken a ton of very tough fights. Hes pretty limited and his wrestling in MMA isn’t even that good considering his elite background. He should dominate this fight thoughTakagi vs. LiRyo Takagi, TKO, R3This is a banger, Rizin is a good landing spot for Li Kaiwen. He’s not good enough to make the ufc but he should have success here. Kaiwen is really fun but he is a limited brawler; when he can’t trade in the pocket he just sits back at range and stares. He had some sick wars on RTU but he’s not overly skilled. Takagi will strike with him but I think he’s a better technician an can fight a smart gameplan. Kaiwen does not have a great process
